description_long: This is a tall, freestanding cabinet with a classic, ornate design, featuring two large paneled doors on the front. The cabinet is finished in a uniform light color, likely painted wood, and stands on four short, decorative legs. The top of the cabinet has a raised border with subtle carved detailing, adding to its elegant appearance. Two metal handles are present on the front doors, suggesting the doors are openable and provide access to the interior storage space. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings or additional features. This type of cabinet would commonly be found in urban environments such as entryways, hallways, or even on sidewalks during furniture disposal or moving.
description: A tall, ornate, light-colored cabinet with two paneled doors and decorative legs, featuring metal handles and a raised, detailed top border.
description_view_0: Front view showing two paneled doors with metal handles and decorative carvings.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the cabinet's depth and plain, flat side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a flat, featureless back panel and the raised top border.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side panel.
